expectations.expectation: Blank web project + installed Chrome DevTools MCP: vibe init recommends/binds browser verification (E11)
Missing capability -> explained remote candidates -> approved install -> locked, verified, reversible (E12)
vibe init runs as a real conversation covering goal, stage, risk, constraints, permissions, preferences (E13)
A planned task executes phase-gated with outcome recording and doctor insights (E14)
Sessions see only capsule-selected tools when hard routing is enabled (E15)
Update/reconcile/audit lifecycle works with re-approval on permission expansion (E16)
Every design success-criteria bullet holds via the traceability matrix
